items.evidence:
Relax SpecIR budget to >= 0.35 mW/MHz
Add power domain / retention cells and re-estimate
Reduce pipeline depth or feature set and re-estimate
items.message: Power budget 0.1 mW/MHz is below estimated minimum 0.35 mW/MHz for EarphoneRV32 with current architecture (iterative divider + clock gating).

suggested_resolutions: Add power domain / retention cells and re-estimate
Reduce pipeline depth or feature set and re-estimate
